summary: Fix employee edit modal select layering, switch reviewed approvals to period filtering, and add TEO approval audit visibility.

notes: Adds approval_audit_scopes for read-only reviewed-timesheet audit visibility.
Seeds Chang Xuesong with TEO reviewed-timesheet audit scope when the matching employee and organization exist.
Keeps audit visibility separate from approval routing and pending task assignment.
Adds scoped read access for timesheets covered by approval audit organization ranges.
Employee edit dialog selects can opt into a modal popover layer so portaled options render above the dialog.
Employee edit now exposes approval audit visible organization ranges.
Reviewed approvals use the BI period selector and default to quarter.
Reviewed approval loading includes the current user's configured audit organization range without changing pending approval loading.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.26.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.26.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.26.
Run scripts/smoke-timesheet-withdraw.sql on the cloud host after deployment.
known_warnings: Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
Unit test command currently exits successfully with no matching test files.
